videos.headline: End zone to end zone! Jeremiyah Love goes 98 yards for ND TD
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love blows past the Indiana defense for a 98-yard rushing touchdown to give Notre Dame the lead after a rapid start.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (End zone to end zone! Jeremiyah Love goes 98 yards for ND TD) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Irish hold off Hoosiers to set up date with Georgia
videos.description: Notre Dame beats Indiana 27-17 in the College Football Playoff first round to set up a visit to Georgia.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Irish hold off Hoosiers to set up date with Georgia) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana D comes up with early INT off deflection
videos.description: D'Angelo Ponds is on hand to make the interception on a deflected pass and recover possession for Indiana vs. Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana D comes up with early INT off deflection) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jayden Thomas collects simple catch for Irish TD

videos.headline: Tempers flare on Notre Dame sideline after late hit on Riley Leonard
videos.description: The Notre Dame sideline voices their frustrations as Riley Leonard is sent flying into the benches by a late hit from Indiana.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tempers flare on Notre Dame sideline after late hit on Riley Leonard) 2024/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: ND's Jeremiyah Love buries defender with brutal stiff-arm
videos.description: Jeremiyah Love secures a Notre Dame first down after stiff-arming an Indiana defender to the ground.
